title: Pasania kunstleri
taxonomy: Pasania kunstleri is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a type of tree native to the Indian subcontinent. The plant is classified within the genus Pasania, which is a group of flowering plants. The Lauraceae family is a large group of flowering plants that includes trees and shrubs. Pasania kunstleri is also known to be a part of the order Laurales.

intro: Pasania kunstleri, also known as the Pasania kunstleri plant, is a species of tree in the family Lauraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties.
